description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a black cover and a gold-edged page block, giving it a classic and formal appearance. The front cover features a prominent red cross, suggesting it is a religious text, likely a Bible. A black ribbon bookmark extends from the bottom, adding a functional and decorative element. The book's cover is plain aside from the cross, with no visible text or additional artwork. The pages appear slightly aged, with a yellowish tint, and the book is closed in all views. The overall construction looks sturdy, with a hard cover and tightly bound pages.
description: A thick, black hardbound book with gold-edged pages and a red cross on the cover, featuring a black ribbon bookmark.
description_view_0: The front cover with a red cross and the ribbon bookmark extending outward are clearly visible.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, showing the gold-edged pages and the flat, plain black cover with the cross.
description_view_2: The back edge of the book is visible, with the gold-edged pages and the plain black cover, no ribbon visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the book, showing the black cover and the ribbon bookmark extending from the back.
attribute_cover_illustration: No illustration visible. The cover is plain black with a single red cross as the only decorative element.
